Even if they were into questionable activities, nobody will remember them. Most Mythag investigators are, first and foremost, involved with dissolution events... so when they die, no record of their activities tends to properly remain. They tend to poke their noses into things that most other people wouldn't as a result.
The worst Mythag aligned individuals are generally the ones that are traitors anyway.
